summary: Iteration 11 validation — new /api/games/top10 + /api/games/most-popular endpoints, Top10HeroCarousel, Coming Soon highlighted section, Most Popular rail, RequestContentPage rebrand, Footer 'Request a Game' text, and new Xbox classic green-X SVG. 21/21 backend pytest PASS. All listed frontend assertions verified live on the preview URL while signed in as CEO.
critical_code_review_comments: game_routes.py: /top10 uses rating>=80 & total_rating_count>100 sorted by total_rating_count desc limit 10 (2h TTL). Returns recognizable top-tier titles (Witcher 3, GTA V, Skyrim, etc.) with developer='CD Projekt RED'/'Rockstar North'/etc. normalized correctly.

game_routes.py: /most-popular uses (follows>5 | hypes>5) & total_rating_count>10 sort follows desc (30m TTL). Verified: result set differs from /top10[:5] — distinct ordering/IDs confirmed in test_most_popular_differs_from_top10.

Home.jsx Coming Soon block uses bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-600/20 via-pink-600/15 to-purple-700/20 with border-orange-500/30 — matches spec ('gradient orange-to-purple, distinct border'). data-testid='coming-soon-section' present.

Top10HeroCarousel.jsx renders data-testid='top10-hero' wrapper, rank number overlay (1..10) via data-testid='top10-rank', prev/next arrows, and a dots container at data-testid='top10-dots'. Auto-rotates every 6s (verified rank 1->2 after 7s wait). Manual next click advances rank. Badge '#{n} IN TOP 10 GAMES TODAY' + 'by <developer>' attribution render correctly (e.g., 'Grand Theft Auto V by Rockstar North', 'The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt by CD Projekt RED').
Individual dot buttons do NOT expose data-testid='top10-dot-{i}' — only the dots wrapper has a testid. Dots are still clickable, but granular per-dot selectors are unavailable. MINOR — not blocking.

RequestContentPage.jsx H1 renders 'Request a Game' (with 'Game' in gradient). data-testid request-type-game/upcoming/dlc all present with Gamepad2/Calendar/Sparkles icons. Title placeholder = 'e.g., Hollow Knight: Silksong, GTA VI, Stardew Valley'. Zero occurrences of 'TV Show', 'Documentary', 'movies', 'documentaries' on rendered page.
Footer.jsx: 'Request' link text is '🎮 Request a Game'. Zero footer occurrences of '🎬' or 'Request Content'.

public/xbox-icon.svg: confirmed 200 OK; contents match spec exactly — circle cx=50 cy=50 r=50 fill=#107c10 (classic Xbox green) with two white stroke paths 'M28 28 L72 72' and 'M72 28 L28 72' (classic X). No helix/spiral geometry.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter11 is green. /api/games/top10 has 2h TTL; /api/games/most-popular has 30m TTL. Both share the existing games_cache TTL index. Top10HeroCarousel auto-rotates every 6s (confirmed via 7s wait showing rank 1->2). Only caveat: individual dot buttons inside data-testid='top10-dots' don't expose per-dot testids (top10-dot-{i}). If granular dot testing is needed later, main agent should add data-testid={`top10-dot-${i}`} to each button. /request-content eagerly redirects to / when unauthenticated (toast 'Sign in required' flashes) — this is expected per iter11 spec (AuthContext loading flag). Welcome tour modal can be bypassed via localStorage.setItem('gamergrid_tour_seen','1') before navigation.
